task: Draft a Twitter/X post about askr's solutions (not just problems) and get honest advice on reaching an audience
discussion_summary: User shared recent tweets that focused on problems encountered while building askr, but realized they haven't communicated what they've actually built or fixed. They asked for help crafting a new tweet that showcases the solution/product and requested honest feedback on audience growth strategy. Session was interrupted mid-investigation—Claude was about to read the askr README to ground the tweet in actual product details.

in_progress.what: Reading README to understand askr's core value proposition for tweet drafting

next_actions.action: Complete the README read and extract 2-3 core value props of askr (what problem it solves, what makes it different)
next_actions.why: Foundation for authentic tweet that showcases solution, not just problems

next_actions.action: Draft 3 tweet options: one technical/builder-focused, one user-benefit focused, one showing before/after of askr solving a real problem
next_actions.why: Give user choice and test different angles for resonance

next_actions.action: Provide honest reach strategy: recommend specific communities (HN, Twitter dev circles, relevant Discord/Slack), content pillars (build-in-public updates, technical deep-dives, user wins), and posting cadence
next_actions.why: User explicitly asked for honesty; generic advice won't help

next_actions.action: Suggest one concrete action for next 48 hours (e.g., 'post solution tweet + share in 2 dev communities + reply to 5 relevant threads')
next_actions.why: Momentum matters; specificity beats vague goals

decisions.decision: Focus tweet on solution/outcome, not problem narrative
decisions.reason: User's previous tweets established the pain point; new tweet should show askr as the answer to build credibility and interest

relational_files.why: Phase 4 (Public Launch) includes 'Twitter/X launch thread' — this session is directly supporting that milestone
Tracks session activity and goals; should be updated once tweet strategy is finalized

blockers: README read was interrupted; need full context on askr's actual capabilities and differentiators before drafting authentic tweet
